brackets_2024.notes: Published by DGFiP. Five-bracket IR schedule for revenu net imposable 2024.

brackets_2025.notes: Indexed +1.8% on 2024 values per PLF 2025 revalorisation announcement.

brackets_2026.notes: Estimated +1.5% indexation on 2025 values. Subject to PLF 2026 confirmation.

abattement_forfaitaire_2024.notes: 10% abattement on salaires, capped at €4,321, floored at €495 (§ 83 CGI, art. 5 LFR 2023).

quotient_familial_2024.notes: Plafonnement du quotient familial: benefit capped at €1,759 per half-part beyond 1 for 2024.

quotient_familial_2025.notes: Plafond estimated at €1,791 (+1.8%) for 2025. To be confirmed by PLF 2025 decree.

decote_2024.notes: Décote for singles: ceiling €1,929; for couples: €3,191. Factor 0.4525. Art. 197 CGI.

pass_2025.notes: PASS 2025 estimated €47,100. Confirm from URSSAF official decree.

csg_crds_rates.notes: CSG 9.2% (déductible 6.8% + non-déductible 2.4%) + CRDS 0.5%. Loi de financement de la sécurité sociale.

agirc_arrco_rates_2024.notes: Tranche 1: employee 3.15%, employer 4.72%. Tranche 2: employee 8.64%, employer 12.95%.

micro_bic_bnc_abattements.notes: Micro-BIC (commerce) 50%, Micro-BNC (services) 34%. Art. 50-0 and 102 ter CGI.

per_deductibility.notes: PER versements volontaires deductible up to 10% of prior year net professional income, capped at 8× PASS. Art. 163 quatervicies CGI.
